arts.ttl: Southampton dealt major blow in Kyle Walker-Peters contract discussions?
arts.sum: Southampton are reportedly far away from agreeing a contract extension with Kyle Walker-Peters after discussions over renewed terms broke down.

arts.ttl: Southampton considering Championship manager as Russell Martin replacement?
arts.sum: Southampton are reportedly eyeing up Blackburn Rovers head coach John Eustace as a potential replacement for under-pressure boss Russell Martin.

arts.ttl: Southampton vs Ipswich Town: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Two of the Premier League's new boys meet at St Mary's on Saturday afternoon when Southampton host Ipswich Town. Ipswich Town predicted lineup vs Southampton (4-2-3-1) : Muric; Tuanzebe, O'Shea, Greaves, Davis; Morsy, Phillips; Hutchinson, Szmodics, Clarke; Delap.

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town: Woody Williamson signs for Chelmsford on loan
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: He now joins Robbie Simpson's side, who currently sit 16th in the sixth tier and already have fellow Town youngster Osman Foyo, who joined the Essex side earlier in the season. - Osman Foyo and Woody Williamson (Chelmsford City)

arts.sum: Town were understood to have been interested in England U21 centre-back Taylor Harwood-Bellis, but he also saw his loan switch to Southampton become a permanent £20m move once Russell Martin's men were promoted. “Southampton have signed some very good players on top of the ones they already had.

arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Southampton and Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: In-depth with AFC Wimbledon’s head of football operations Craig Cope - The youngest Football League transfer chief, ‘brave’ Dons squad rebuild, Al-Hamadi’s Ipswich switch and hopes of leaving a legacy
arts.sum: But on the day Cope was set to start with his new venture away from the game, he landed on an opportunity at Solihull Moors in the National League, which saw him handle the transition to taking the club to a full-time basis and revamping the analyst and recruitment department. Wimbledon plucked Cope from the midlands in January 2023, four years into his time at Damson Park, where he assembled a squad under former Dons legend Neal Ardley which was one game away from reaching the Football League for the first time in its history – suffering a National League play-off final 2-1 defeat to Grimsby Town in June 2022.

arts.ttl: Southampton v Ipswich Town preview: Focus on the Saints
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: When it comes to summer signings, Southampton were among the busiest in the Premier League, bringing in 17 players for their first team squad and a few more for their Under-21s. If there’s one positive from the season so far, it has to be Tyler Dibling, who would’ve been about 10 years old when Southampton were playing European football and competing at the top of the Premier League.
